content: Self-Refine's iterative no-training feedback loop for output improvement can be extended by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement framework that avoids the stagnation of single-perspective self-refinement. This hybrid framework would expose blind spots a single self-feedback loop cannot catch, while retaining Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning.
